personal.preferred_title: Senior Data Engineer | Capacity Planning & AI-Driven Infrastructure Optimization
personal.address: Murphy, TX (Plano area) / 424 Oriole Dr., Murphy, TX 75094

summary: Senior Capacity and Data Engineer with 20+ years of enterprise experience optimizing system performance, forecasting capacity demand, and scaling infrastructure through data-driven decisions. Built telemetry pipelines for 6,000+ endpoints, delivered predictive bottleneck models, and produced executive risk dashboards to improve throughput and resource allocation. Strong in performance analytics, observability, and cross-functional execution across engineering and operations.

experience.title: Senior Capacity & Data Engineer
bullets: Built and operated telemetry pipelines ingesting metrics from 6,000+ endpoints to support large-scale capacity and performance analysis.
Developed predictive models to identify performance and capacity bottlenecks 3-6 months ahead, improving planning and mitigation lead time.
Performed sustained bottleneck/root-cause analysis across compute and application layers using integrated monitoring datasets.
Delivered leadership risk summaries and KPI dashboards that guided prioritization and throughput optimization.
Drove efficiency improvements and resource optimization through data-driven capacity actions.

experience.title: Performance Engineer
bullets: Led performance analysis and optimization initiatives for revenue-critical systems.
Conducted detailed bottleneck investigations and presented quantified before/after impact to stakeholders.
Supported cloud migration performance validation and monitoring upgrades.

experience.title: Senior Consultant (CA APM SME)
bullets: Managed large-scale APM deployments and optimization for enterprise financial platforms.
Designed performance dashboards and operational analytics that improved incident detection and remediation speed.
Partnered with engineering teams to improve scalability and reliability through targeted tuning.

education.degree: High Diploma / Post-Graduate Diploma in Computer Engineering Technology / Computer Science
Bachelor of Science in Civil Engineering

projects.name: HorizonScale - AI Capacity Forecasting Engine
